implemented_slice: Added migration 0006_model_activation_refresh_state with a global active scoring profile unique index.
Added active_analysis_contexts to persist the active profile, data snapshot, score snapshot, refresh token, generation and affected modules.
Added POST /v1/scoring/profiles/{profileVersionId}/activate with expected active profile conflict detection.
Added POST /v1/scoring/profiles/{profileVersionId}/rollback with the same expected-active and refresh-token stale-client guardrails.

Activation locks the current and target profile rows, creates a completed scoring_run snapshot, switches the active profile, updates active_analysis_contexts and writes operation_logs in one transaction.
Stale expected active profile requests return 409 and keep the previous active profile unchanged while logging a conflict result for activation and rollback action types.
Added a frontend API-first model-center activation adapter and controls that send expected_active_profile_version_id plus client_refresh_token to the transaction endpoint.
Added a model-center rollback control that reactivates the previous profile through the dedicated transactional rollback endpoint.
Added config/model_profiles/supply-chain-v3.json as an inactive immutable candidate profile loaded by the PostgreSQL seed path.

Added live Playwright coverage that activates supply-chain-v3, observes a transaction-created scoring_run snapshot, checks stale refresh semantics and rolls back to balanced-v2 through FastAPI/PostgreSQL.
validation_commands: PYTHONPATH=/private/tmp/eei-ruff:/private/tmp/eei-pydeps python3 -m ruff check apps/api/app/domain.py apps/api/app/domain_repository.py tests/integration/test_database_migrations.py scripts/check_database_schema.py scripts/load_seed_catalogs.py
npx --yes pnpm@11.8.0 --filter @eei/web exec playwright test --config=../../playwright.config.ts tests/e2e/state-contract.spec.ts -g "A204 and A205"
not_closed_scope: Model-center online profile editing and dedicated score recompute controls are not complete.
Worker-driven data snapshot refresh and transactional outbox remain open.
rollback: Run scripts/migrate.py downgrade --steps 1 to remove active_analysis_contexts and the global active profile index in affected environments.
Confirm data/task_backlog.csv returns T1303/A204-A205 to NOT STARTED if the contract slice is removed.
Regenerate release artifacts and rerun make verify plus make verify-g2-db.
